Zhu Reng Á•ù‰ªç
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Reng (Á•ù‰ªç)was born in Shiping commandery. Palace Grandee for Wei, had famous descendants. Zhu Reng may not have existed in history. Zhu Reng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
